subcodes.title: Words spoken to Siyavash Sifidvash on board the SS Cedric at sea, 1912-03-24
subcodes.first_line: Convey unto his honor Mirza Siyavash, on my behalf, expressions of the utmost yearning and affection. In very truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بجناب میرزا سیاوش از قبل من نهایت اشتیاق و محبت را ابلاغ دارید فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
